meaning: n.[药]醋氨酚,对乙酰氨基酚,退热净(一种替代阿司匹林的解热镇痛药)
examples: But acetaminophen is a fairly weak analgesic, experts say.
What’s the main lesson from the panel review of acetaminophen?
Pain relievers such as aspirin, ibuprofen and acetaminophen all can stave off hangover headaches.
And I stay away from acetaminophen, because it further taxes your already booze-stressed liver.
